_comment: Universal multipliers and rank-default sig curves. All values empirically locked in Phase 0 per architecture-v5.md §16.

_ranks_provenance.4: Maestro, Nova, Deadpool, IIM cross-confirmed against MCOCHUB
_ranks_provenance.3: Onslaught (28024/40580=0.6906), Silver Surfer (27865/40320=0.6911), QuickSilver (27810/40260=0.6907) from auntm.ai
_ranks_provenance.2: Out of scope — R2 cannot reach top-30 prestige
_ranks_provenance.1: Out of scope — R1 cannot reach top-30 prestige

sigCurves._anchors_normalised: Each curve is normalised fraction-of-distance-from-sig0-to-sig200 at each anchor.
sigCurves._rank4_note: R4 curve geometrically interpolated between R3 and R5 — refine with auntm.ai R4 page when available.
